other_findings.finding: Reynolds et al. (2021) Fig. 3C legend refers to 'enrichment of gene signatures for murine dermal CD11c+ (DC2)', confirming DC2 corresponds to cDC2 subset
DC2 cells are observed in embryonic skin as early as 7 PCW, prior to bone marrow hematopoiesis
Human cDC2 express CD1c together with CLEC10A and FcεR1α; DC2 are bona fide cDC while DC3 (CD163+) share features with monocytes
In the PAGA analysis of skin MPs, DC1 and DC2 form the myeloid DC branch of differentiation distinct from LCs and mo-DCs

evidence_quotes.quote: We observe Dendritic Cells 1 and 2 (DC1, DC2) and Langerhans cells (LCs) in embryonic skin as early as 7 PCW, prior to bone marrow hematopoiesis, but macrophages are the dominant MP in first trimester skin
evidence_quotes.source_file: Reynolds et al. (2021) PDF full text

evidence_quotes.quote: cDC2, also known as CD1c+ DC, express CD1c together with CD301 (CLEC10A) and FcεR1α and are the human equivalent to murine cDC2
evidence_quotes.source_file: Heger et al. (2022) Guidelines for DC preparation and flow cytometric analysis. DOI:10.1002/eji.202249917
